checks.detail: 1 required form(s) present, signed, and accepted version
consistent: loss within policy period; loss on/before reported; reported on/before prepared

gaps.detail: deadline 'notice_of_loss' due in 5 day(s) (<= 7-day at-risk window)

considerations: Readiness reflects document/form presence, field completeness, chronology, and timeliness only, not whether the loss is covered or excluded.
A coverage, eligibility, or settlement determination is the adjuster's and insurer's decision, made from the policy and facts.
Confirm the policy is in force and check endorsements, limits, and deductibles against the system of record.
Obtain or re-request any missing or illegible required items before submission.
Verify each deadline against the controlling policy and jurisdiction; do not rely on this list alone.
disclaimer: Readiness and completeness check only; not a coverage, eligibility, or claim decision. No claim has been adjudicated, approved, denied, or paid.
narrative: Readiness check of claim CLM-2026-88421 (policy ****4521, auto_collision) as of 2026-07-15 found 1 blocking gap and 2 minor gaps, so the package is Not ready to submit. The required repair estimate is not present (blocking); the acord_claim_form is present, signed, and on an accepted version, proof_of_loss and police_report are present, all required fields are complete, and the chronology is consistent (loss within the policy period, on/before reported, reported on/before prepared). Minor gaps: photos are missing and the notice_of_loss deadline is due in 5 days, inside the 7-day at-risk window. Obtain the repair estimate and photos and confirm the notice_of_loss filing before submission. Readiness and completeness check only; not a coverage, eligibility, or claim decision. No claim has been adjudicated, approved, denied, or paid.
